Subject: Re: A quick follow-up thought about how FlowAI could help {{company}} this quarter

Hey {{first_name}},

Following up on my last note.

I came across {{company}}'s recent blog post on scaling operations — solid thinking on process efficiency. That's exactly the problem FlowAI was built to solve.

Would it help to see a quick walkthrough? I can keep it to 15 minutes.

[Signature]
